framework.name: Variable vs Category Pricing Models in Expert Networks
framework.description: Expert networks use two billing structures: Variable Pricing (your rate determines client cost on sliding scale) and Category Pricing (your rate falls into predefined ranges with fixed client costs). In Category Pricing, pricing at $199 vs $200 can determine which tier you're in, dramatically affecting selection odds.
framework.raw_quote: In Category Pricing, your consulting hourly rate will fall within a range pre-determined by the client, and the client has already agreed upon the same charge per category. In this scenario, it is crucial you price your rate within the lower category ($199 instead of $200) to increase your profile competitiveness.

source.title: Setting Your Expert Network Consulting Rate • Expert Opportunities
